Looks like a flapper (16 fires/hr, auto-resolves in 47s), but the metrics.csv trough ratchets up every cycle: drains to 2050, then 5100, then 12050, then 15700, never back to the 210 baseline. pat-rollup-queue-ratchet +260% negative. A saturating consumer, not noise.

Expected backfill steady-state.
